items.name_en: New SERPENTI ELLIPSE series large shoulder bag
items.name_cn:
New SERPENTI ELLIPSE series large shoulder bag
Adding a touch of fashion to the SERPENTI FOREVER world with its unique shape, iconic details, and versatile charm.
This everyday bag is crafted from red calfskin, featuring city-grain calfskin in the center and smooth calfskin on the sides, accented with gold-plated brass. The enchanting classic snake head is centered with black scales and red enamel eyes, with the front magnetic closure hidden underneath.
It features a single compartment, an adjustable chain and leather shoulder strap, and a detachable leather handle, allowing it to be worn crossbody or as a classic shoulder bag. A practical top zipper with an internal pocket, and a back external pocket with a BVLGARI metal logo.
Model: 291636
Dimensions: 25.5×25×5.5 cm

items.name_en: New SERPENTI ELLIPSE Large Crossbody Bag
items.name_cn:
New SERPENTI ELLIPSE Large Crossbody Bag
Add a touch of fashion to the SERPENTI FOREVER world with its unique shape, iconic details, and versatile charm.
Crafted from pink calfskin, this daily bag features urban grained calfskin in the center and smooth calfskin on the sides, accented with gold-plated brass fittings. The charming classic snake head is centered with black scales and red enamel eyes, with a magnetic snap concealed on the front.
Features a single compartment, adjustable chain and leather shoulder strap, and a detachable leather handle, allowing it to be worn crossbody or as a classic shoulder bag. Practical top zipper with an internal pocket, an external pocket on the back, and a BVLGARI metal logo.
Model: 291636
Dimensions: 25.5×25×5.5 cm

specs.rawTitle:
New SERPENTI ELLIPSE Large Crossbody Bag
Add a touch of fashion to the SERPENTI FOREVER world with its unique shape, iconic details, and versatile charm.
Crafted from pink calfskin, this daily bag features urban grained calfskin in the center and smooth calfskin on the sides, accented with gold-plated brass fittings. The charming classic snake head is centered with black scales and red enamel eyes, with a magnetic snap concealed on the front.
Features a single compartment, adjustable chain and leather shoulder strap, and a detachable leather handle, allowing it to be worn crossbody or as a classic shoulder bag. Practical top zipper with an internal pocket, an external pocket on the back, and a BVLGARI metal logo.
Model: 291636
Dimensions: 25.5×25×5.5 cm
